description: Outcome of an outbound AI appointment-reminder/confirmation call. Set on the reminder assistant under analysisPlan.structuredDataPlan.schema; the vapi-webhook reads message.analysis.structuredData.reminder_outcome.

reminder_outcome.description: The clear result of the reminder call.

patient_name.description: The patient's name as heard on the call, if stated.

notes.description: Any short, relevant note (e.g. preferred new time the patient mentioned, or that they reported an emergency).
